final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit register with an asynchronous active-low reset and disable signal. The register updates its value on the negative clock edge when the disable signal is low.
module register (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit register with an asynchronous active-low reset and disable signal. The register updates its value on the negative clock edge when the disable signal is low.
